title: Croatian Salad
description: A refreshing Croatian-inspired salad made with fresh lettuce, iceberg, and a hint of Croatian spices.

ingredients.name: Fresh Lettuce
ingredients.notes: Any type of fresh lettuce works well

ingredients.name: Iceberg Lettuce
ingredients.notes: Add a crunchy texture with iceberg lettuce

ingredients.name: Croatian Salad
ingredients.notes: Use a store-bought or homemade Croatian salad mix

ingredients.name: Light Olive Oil
ingredients.notes: Use a light olive oil for a refreshing flavor

ingredients.name: Red Wine Vinegar
ingredients.notes: Add a tangy flavor with red wine vinegar

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Season with salt to bring out the flavors

ingredients.name: Black Pepper
ingredients.notes: Add a touch of black pepper for extra flavor

instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine the fresh lettuce and iceberg lettuce.
2. Add the Croatian salad mix and toss to combine.
3. In a small bowl, whisk together the light olive oil and red wine vinegar.
4. Pour the dressing over the salad and toss to coat.
5. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
